issues.description: Condition should be 'Always' not 'HasRestingDon'. The card text shows DON!! cost is optional (You may return...), not a requirement. The HasRestingDon condition makes it mandatory.

Duration 'EndOfBattle' is incorrect. Text states 'during this battle' which means the keyword applies for the duration of the battle. Should be 'DuringBattle' or similar battle-scoped duration, not EndOfBattle which implies it expires after battle ends.
